data.rag_results_preview:
['# IT Support Contact Information

IT Support is available Monday-Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM EST.
Password resets: Use the self-service portal at password.acme.internal
Hardware requests: Submit a ticket through ServiceNow
Emergency IT issues: Call the 24/7 hotline at ext. 5555

Do not share your credentials with anyone, including IT staff.', '# Password Reset Policy

Employees can reset their passwords using the self-service portal at https://password.acme.internal

Requirements:
- Passwo
data.response_preview: Hello, I'd like to assist you with installing the internal package `acme-agent-core`. Can you please confirm that you have the necessary credentials to access the self-service portal at `https://password.acme.internal` and are familiar with the password reset policy? Additionally, do you need any help with troubleshooting or have specific questions about this installation process?
